target_audience: A first-time operator or buyer deciding whether AOF is concrete enough to trust.
expected_quality_delta: The improved artifact should explain the buyer problem in plain language instead of generic framework language.
The improved artifact should ground claims in benchmark/runtime evidence.
The improved artifact should make the next action and value proposition clearer on first read.
organization_change_expected: The review should note that buyer-facing critique and benchmark evidence were missing in the earlier version.
The review should connect the improvement to stronger review-loop expectations, not only better copy.
benchmark_expectation: A strong review should explain concrete before/after quality deltas and link the improvement to audience-facing review discipline.
